Container.Name: BeatsCheck
Container.Overview: Audio file integrity checker that decode-tests all audio files (FLAC, MP3, M4A, OGG, Opus, WAV, AAC, and more) using ffmpeg. Identifies corrupted files that cause playback errors.[br][br]The container scans on a schedule and stays running. Default: weekly scans in report-only mode (nothing deleted).[br][br]To review results: check /config/corrupt.txt[br]To delete corrupt files: docker exec -it BeatsCheck /app/delete.sh

Config.Name: Music Library
Config.Description: Path to your music library. Mounted read-only by default. Change to rw if using move or delete modes.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Persistent storage for logs, scan results, and tracking data.

Config.Name: Run Interval
Config.Description: Hours between scans. Container stays running between scans. Examples: 168 = weekly, 24 = daily, 12 = twice daily, 0 = scan once and exit.

Config.Name: Delete After
Config.Description: Automatically delete corrupt files after this many days. Gives you time to review corrupt.txt before files are removed. 0 = never auto-delete (use interactive delete instead).

Config.Name: Mode
Config.Description: Scan mode. setup = idle, no scanning (default). report = scan and log only. move = auto-move corrupt files to quarantine folder (requires Corrupted Output path and rw music mount).

Config.Name: Workers
Config.Description: Parallel ffmpeg decode workers. Higher = faster scans but more CPU. 2 = conservative, 4 = balanced, 8+ = fast on high-core-count CPUs.

Config.Name: Corrupted Output
Config.Description: Only needed for move mode. Corrupt files are moved here preserving folder structure. Leave empty if using report or delete modes.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging verbosity. INFO = normal, DEBUG = verbose (useful for troubleshooting), WARNING = quiet, ERROR = errors only.

Config.Name: Max Auto Delete
Config.Description: Safety threshold. Auto-delete aborts if more files than this would be removed in one run. Prevents catastrophic deletion from filesystem issues. 0 = no limit.

Config.Name: Min File Age
Config.Description: Skip files modified within this many minutes. Prevents flagging files being actively downloaded or imported.

Config.Name: Max Log Size
Config.Description: Rotate log when it exceeds this size (MB). Rotation triggers a fresh full rescan. 0 = never rotate.

Config.Name: Lidarr URL
Config.Description: Lidarr instance URL (e.g. http://lidarr:8686). When set with API key, corrupt files are deleted via Lidarr API so Lidarr can clean its database and re-download. Leave empty to disable.

Config.Name: Lidarr API Key
Config.Description: Lidarr API key (Settings > General in Lidarr). Required if Lidarr URL is set.

Config.Name: Lidarr Search
Config.Description: Queue album search after auto-deleting corrupt files so Lidarr re-downloads them. Processes 5 albums/hour during idle to avoid flooding trackers. Requires Lidarr URL and API key.
